---
title: "Collaboration & Impact"
subtitle: "Working with organizations, government, and the wider social network science community"
---

The Social Networks Group – UC contributes beyond academia through executive education, advisory work, and an active alliance with the Chilean social network science community.

## Executive Education

::: {.snuc-card}
### Diplomado en Inteligencia Relacional para Organizaciones
A continuing-education program applying social network analysis to organizations — helping leaders and practitioners diagnose and act on the relational structures inside their institutions.

<!-- TODO: add program length, intake dates, target audience, and enrollment link. -->
:::

## Consultancy & Advisory

We are open to advisory and consultancy work applying network analysis to organizational, governmental, and civil-society settings. If your organization is interested in a diagnostic or collaboration, [get in touch](contact.qmd).

## Alliance

::: {.snuc-alliance}
**[CHISOCNET — Chilean Society for Social Network Science](https://www.chisocnet.org)**

The Social Networks Group – UC is an active partner of CHISOCNET, which aims to develop social network science in Chile into an internationally recognized field of reference for Ibero-America — through conferences, seminars, and a summer school.
:::
